title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at CMA CGM India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at CMA CGM India
jsonLd.description:
Join the CMA CGM India family as a Fleet Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CMA CGM India:
CMA CGM India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMA CGM India!
